name: Public Joint Stock Company Magadanenergo
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Magadanenergo engages in the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity and heat in Russia. The company is also involved in the repair, reconstruction, and modernization of energy facilities, as well as maintenance of transport, buildings, and structures of the power system. It also conducts repairs for transformers and generators, as well as other installations; and manufactures and repairs equipment of power units of heat, coils, boilers heating surfaces, half couplings, fittings, gas ducts, etc. The company supplies electricity in the Magadan region, Chukotka Autonomous district, and Nizhnekolymsky Oymyakon ulus; and heat in Magadan, Anadyr, Pevek, Myaundzha, and Egvekinot. It has electric power stations with an installed capacity of 320 MW; and installed thermal capacity of the stations is 646 Gcal / h. Public Joint Stock Company Magadanenergo was founded in 1966 and is based in Magadan, Russia.
